title: fire alarms
body:
**the icon might be broken**

Transform your virtual space with this innovative addition that not only enhances your interior design but also serves as a vital safety feature. With meticulously crafted details, this mod seamlessly integrates aesthetically pleasing fire alarms into your virtual environment.

Experience the realism of a not functional fire alarm system that adds depth and authenticity to your virtual spaces. Whether you're designing a cozy living room, a bustling office, or a sleek modern kitchen, the Fire Alarms Mod offers a variety of designs to complement any style or theme.
With no realistic sound effects and visual cues, you can count on these alarms to keep your virtual inhabitants safe and sound.

Elevate your virtual spaces with the Fire Alarms Mod – where safety and style converge in perfect harmony.
